title: Problems importing contacts and automatically linking them to previously imported Accounts

posts.author: rcastanho (Ricardo Castanho)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello community,

we are new to monday.com and I hope someone out there could help us with tips on setting up everything.

I have imported our accounts (companies, clients) to Monday.com and now I want to import all the contacts we have. These should be linked to the accounts (we are migrating the accounts and contacts from an offline CRM to monday.com).

The import works, but I cannot get the contacts automatically linked to the accounts. When importing, the field with the name of the account cannot be linked to the target field of the accounts.

Any ideas on how to solve this problem? Using a CRM only makes sense if we dont have to invest time to manually link every contact to an existing account (again).

Thanks a lot for your help!

Ricardo

thanks my issue has been fixed.

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @rcastanho

Welcome to the Community!

It’s not currently possible to automatically link items via the import. This isn’t a supported column type for import at present, I’m afraid.

That said, you can set up automations to create links between items based on specific matching values.
You might like to try either of the following automations:

image1352×614 45.3 KB

It’s worth noting that these automations are not retroactive, so they will only apply to newly created or updated items.

Could this be an option for you at all?

Best,

Dani
